# Omar Al-Bakri — Applied AI Engineer

Omar Al-Bakri builds applied AI systems end to end across Python and TypeScript. He combines hands-on engineering across orchestration, retrieval, evaluation, APIs, data, integrations, and product delivery with enterprise payments and commercial experience.

## Opportunity fit

- Applied AI Engineer
- AI Agent / Agent Platform Engineer
- Forward-Deployed AI / Solutions Engineer
- FinTech and Payments AI
- AI Architect / Transformation Consultant
- GTM and Commercial AI Engineer

Omar is available immediately, works remote-first, is based in Thailand, and has unrestricted UK work authorisation.

## Selected systems

### CallScore

A public AI product for evidence-backed creator intelligence. It connects creator statements with timestamped market evidence and supports transparent scoring and analysis workflows.

### ruleIQ

An AI compliance platform using graph and retrieval patterns to connect frameworks, obligations, controls, and evidence.

### Helios

An AI-assisted commercial workflow platform connecting user interfaces, API services, orchestration, and sales-tool integrations.

### thredOS

A typed multi-agent workflow runtime for policy-controlled, long-horizon work.

## Consulting offers

- AI Opportunity Audit — from £1,500
- Agent Prototype Sprint — from £4,500
- RAG and Evaluation Hardening — from £3,000
- FinTech GTM Automation — from £3,500
- Fractional Applied AI Lead — from £5,000/month
- Payments AI Advisory — from £1,250/day
